response.justification: Bogdan has an impressive track record as a senior and staff software engineer with deep expertise in distributed systems, testing, and technical mentoring. However, he falls significantly short of the minimum requirement of 8 years of C++ programming, possessing only brief and dated experience with the language. Furthermore, his background leans heavily toward full-stack and web applications rather than the low-level compute, storage, and hardware architecture required for this internal cloud compute platform role.
strengths: Proven technical leadership and mentoring capabilities, evidenced by organizing workshops, coding dojos, and training courses.
Strong expertise in distributed systems and microservices, including handling millions of HTTP requests per second.
Deep commitment to software craftsmanship, testing (TDD), and CI/CD best practices.
concerns: Fails to meet the strict minimum requirement of 8 years of C++ programming experience.
Lacks deep, low-level infrastructure experience with core cloud compute, storage, or hardware architecture.
Recent roles focus predominantly on full-stack web development (TypeScript, Node.js) rather than foundational cloud platform engineering.
